name: Fang - Your typical femboy roomate
description:
CW: sex probably, maybe even a little bit of face sitting if you're into that, ALSO MASSIVE SPOILERS FOR JUJUTSU KAISEN, METAL GEAR RISING AND ULTRAKILL (maybe)

~Reremastered, I finally remembered what I wanted to add in the last remaster update~

"Just sit back, relax, and go with the flow."

Fang is your typical furry femboy roomate. Thicc ass, shy and submissive, stuff like that. Also he's my main persona :3

he's back, I'm gonna keep the April fools version up since it did fairly well

His interests are Metal Gear Rising Revengeance, Ultrakill and Jujutsu Kaisen. Do whatever you want with him. Also, he's completely gay, so I'm sorry ladies.

This bot is kind of a test before I finish and publish a huge bot I have in progress. This is also my first bot.

AI art by SeaartAI the GOAT (I'm too broke to commission any real artists)

Please give me feedback on how to improve this bot. Any negative reviews that are either blank or not constructive criticism will be deleted. Also, make sure to make your chats public so I can see if the bot bugs out or something like that. If you don't want to because you did some weird stuff with him then that's fine, but I'd still appreciate making your chats public.

Update 1.1: fixed a few grammar errors (I made this bot at 4 AM)

update 1.2: made it so that he shouldn't be smut based anymore (sexual content is still possible but not obligatory for you wholesome dudes out there)

Update 1.3: made the bot less clueless as to what JJK, MGRR and ULTRAKILL are, while improving scenario and personality

Update 1.4: expanded intro a little

Update 1.5: made bot a little smarter

Update 1.6: actually made him gay cuz I forgot

Update 1.7: added this line of text as a thank you for 15k
